name: unifi-protect-talkback-ha
description: Home Assistant Add-on: Web interface, live view (HLS), talkback, ringtone control and display messages for UniFi Protect G4/G5 Doorbells.

scripts.server:https: SERVER=1 HTTPS=1 SSL_KEY=certs/key.pem SSL_CERT=certs/cert.pem tsx src/index.ts
scripts.generate:selfsigned-cert: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout certs/key.pem -out certs/cert.pem -days 365 -nodes -subj '/CN=localhost'
scripts.generate:aac-tone: mkdir -p samples && ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i 'sine=frequency=440:duration=5' -c:a aac -b:a 32k -ar 16000 -ac 1 -f adts samples/test-tone.aac
scripts.generate:aac-tone-22050: mkdir -p samples && ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i 'sine=frequency=440:duration=5' -c:a aac -b:a 32k -ar 22050 -ac 1 -f adts samples/test-tone-22050.aac
scripts.generate:aac-tone-22050-64k: mkdir -p samples && ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i 'sine=frequency=440:duration=5' -c:a aac -b:a 64k -ar 22050 -ac 1 -f adts samples/test-tone-22050-64k.aac

author: Christian Höll
